source_summary: A small-town archive discovers that a mislabeled reel may contain the only surviving record of a beloved local broadcast.
raw_text: Fixture only. Shape this as a media-restoration adventure, not a sci-fi anthology plot.
fixture_casting_brief: Characters orbit the care, recovery, and meaning of a media artifact: The Missing Reel In Cabinet 14
fixture_close_brief: Archive note: preservation work can change what a community remembers and who gets heard.
fixture_fidelity_rules: Do not convert the archive object into a futuristic invention.
